remarks: Enjoy effortless one-level living in this beautifully appointed New Canaan residence, ideally located just a short stroll from everything downtown New Canaan has to offer - boutique shopping, acclaimed dining, cafes, Mead Park, and the train. Overlooking the picturesque beauty of Mead Park, this home offers the perfect blend of tranquility, convenience, and sophisticated in-town living. Sunlight pours into the inviting living room, anchored by a classic fireplace and flowing seamlessly into a gracious dining area ideal for both everyday living and entertaining. The oversized primary suite serves as a private retreat, complete with a dressing area and full bath. A thoughtfully updated bath features quality finishes and timeless style. An additional bedroom plus a versatile third bedroom or home office provide flexibility for guests, remote work, or today's evolving lifestyle needs. Step outside to a private patio perfect for al fresco dining, morning coffee, or simply relaxing while taking in the serene park views. AND, there's a spacious lawn area for frolicking or picnicking. Offered UNFURNISHED or FURNISHED (additional charge) for ultimate convenience and flexibility, this exceptional rental presents a rare opportunity to enjoy turnkey living in one of New Canaan's most desirable in-town locations. (NOTE: There are about eight steps down to get to the unit door.)
